channel.title: NCv6 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in NCv6 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure NC RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition v6 Series Virtual Machines
item.description:
Azure NCv6-series virtual machines are now generally available in Southeast Asia and West US 2. They use NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs with 96 GB of memory per GPU.

  • Source: Azure Updates
